phase: M1 — populate empty monolith tables from available data

doctrine_s129.q1_question: What roundstats/playermatchstats enrichment can we derive from the 3 available .dem files?
doctrine_s129.q2_simplest: populate_round_stats.py — single pass: parse .dem → INSERT roundstats → UPDATE playermatchstats
doctrine_s129.q4_tested_subset: 3 .dem files processed; round-1 boundary warning on m2-nuke logged, not fatal
doctrine_s129.q5_reversible: DELETE FROM roundstats WHERE demo_name IN (...); playermatchstats columns nullable

warnings: vitality-vs-the-mongolz-m2-nuke: missing round 1 boundaries — round_number starts at 2

matchresult.blocker: Needs HLTV match-result data (team IDs, event names). Blocked on H2 code + H3 execution.

mapveto.blocker: Needs HLTV veto sequences. Blocked on H2 code + H3 execution.

blockers.roundstats_beyond_3_demos: Blocked on M2 (.dem re-acquisition via HLTV demo URLs from H3). 201 demos have playermatchstats but no .dem file on disk.
blockers.matchresult_mapveto: Structurally blocked — HLTV scraper currently only fetches player stats, not match results. H2 extends scraper for match-level data. H3 executes (requires FlareSolverr + user authorization).

next_decision: Data layer is defensible (392M ticks, 2030 playermatchstats, 640 roundstats, 55 recovered shards). User feedback (2026-05-05): run training pipeline before proposing more data work. Surface decision: train now vs H2 code sprint.
